title: Hymenocharis secunda
taxonomy: Hymenocharis secunda belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This classification puts it in the order Asparagales, a group of monocot flowering plants. As a member of Orchidaceae, Hymenocharis secunda is closely related to other orchids. Its classification also indicates that it shares characteristics with other Asparagales, such as a spiral arrangement of leaves and flowers. Within the family Orchidaceae, Hymenocharis secunda is further classified into specific genera and subgenera.
